title: PerturBench Processed Perturbation Datasets

data_urls.access_notes: Dataset files can be large; choose a bounded task before downloading.

instructions: Inspect the repository task definitions before downloading data.
Download only the selected processed h5ad task files.
Record perturbation, cell type, covariate, and split metadata in the dataset manifest.

recommended_axes.name: perturbation_network_distance
recommended_axes.definition: GO, Reactome, KEGG, STRING, target-pathway, or embedding distance between perturbations.

recommended_axes.name: component_support
recommended_axes.definition: Fraction of combination perturbation components observed in training; useful but often schema-obvious.

useful_for: Perturbation generalization audits beyond component-support demos.
Testing unseen perturbation, unseen cell type, and covariate-transfer settings.
Hard capsules where external pathway or gene-network structure matters.
leakage_risks: Perturbation names may expose support structure.
Response-profile similarity is post-hoc/leaky for split design.
Batch, donor, cell type, and source-dataset covariates can dominate apparent perturbation effects.
